pr.title: [WIP] Improve workflow deployments by passing Terraform outputs downstream
pr.body:
- [x] Inspect existing deployment workflows and shared Terraform output handling
- [x] Run existing build/lint checks to capture baseline state before edits
- [x] Implement minimal workflow changes to make deployment orchestration more hierarchical and improve Terraform output propagation downstream
- [ ] Add/adjust focused validation for workflow logic changes
- [ ] Re-run targeted checks after edits
- [ ] Run CodeQL check and finalize
pr.author: Copilot
